message:
fix(agentmail): add fallback for legacy list_reservations tool name

Adds graceful fallback when Agent Mail server exposes the reservations
listing tool under a legacy name, improving compatibility across
different server versions.

Agent Mail Tools:
- Try list_file_reservations first (preferred name)
- Fall back to list_reservations if first call fails
- Return original error to preserve diagnostic context

Notify Simplification:
- Remove unused logFile field from Notifier struct
- Simplify Close() to no-op (log files opened/closed per write)
- Retain Close() signature for future extensibility

These changes improve backward compatibility with older Agent Mail
deployments while cleaning up unused code in the notify package.
